timeline.text: Today in White House/Vatican feud plus RFK’s raccoon-diary aura: make elite power look administratively tacky, not grand.
Trump fast-tracking psychedelics/ibogaine for veterans — the whole country is now enlightenment sold through executive-order procurement jargon.
Current event update: White House/Vatican feud plus RFK’s raccoon-diary aura has the tone of make elite power look administratively tacky, not grand.
